concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 构建蒙特卡洛模拟程序，通过大量随机抽样模拟麋鹿种群与环境的交互，输出统计平均的最终种群数量，并与给定数据对比以验证模型。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We then constructed a Monte Carlo Simulation Program to test our function for us. The program simulates the elk population’s interaction with Nature based on the functions derived in the iterated model for a large number of trials and outputs a statistical average of final population for comparison to our given data.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 对偷猎率、捕食率、事故率、疾病率、未知因素率和怀孕率分别进行灵敏度分析，通过改变单一参数观察种群输出变化。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 2.6 Sensitivity of the Model ... 2.6.1 Sensitivity of the Poached Rate ... 2.6.2 Sensitivity of the Predator Rate ... 2.6.3 Sensitivity of the Accident Rate ... 2.6.4 Sensitivity of the Sickness Rate ... 2.6.5 Sensitivity of the Unknown Rate ... 2.6.6 Sensitivity of the Pregnancy Rate

concepts_used.title: 非线性与指数模型拟合
concepts_used.how_used: 使用迭代函数模型预测种群变化，将出生率、死亡率与环境承载力结合，形成非线性增长模型。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We then estimated the carrying capacity of the elk population by rearranging the main function and calculating the arithmetic mean of all data inputted into it, and combined the above models to form our final elk population iterated model.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出11条模型假设，包括时间步长为年、最大寿命25年、雌性怀孕必产一仔、最小繁殖年龄24个月、环境稳定等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt:
2.2 Assumptions
1. Our model is based on the annual increments of time...
2. All elks have a maximum lifespan of 25 years...
3. A female elk, if pregnant, will always successfully give birth to one baby elk...
4. Female elks can only become impregnated if they are above or equal to 24 months old...
5. The natural environment...is consistent and stable...
6. Elk that die during a given year are not factored into the calculation of the birth of new elks that year...
7. A “mature” elk is an elk that is of or older than 24 months of age
8. All elks reintroduced are already mature elks...
9. The male-to-female ratio is very close to 1:1...
10. All baby elks are born in autumn.
11. The GSMNP does not experience changes in land, resources, climate, and governance.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 通过比较模拟输出与给定数据的绝对误差来评估模型准确性，将绝对不确定性降低到给定统计数据的较小值。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: After optimization and modification of the constant rates into functions, the absolute uncertainty of elks was reduced to for any set of given statistics (including total poached, total killed by predators, total killed by accidents, total killed by sickness etc.)

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：Introduction（引言）、Methods（模型构建与求解）、Results（结果）、Discussion（灵敏度分析、改进、计划），并包含摘要、假设、变量表等。
